entity.country_or_origin: Vaulta, WAX, and BNB Chain ecosystems
entity.summary: Multichain decentralized exchange and liquidity platform providing token swaps, liquidity-provider positions, pool yield metrics, and related DeFi trading and liquidity services.
entity.notes: Current first-party application endpoint is reachable. Official DefiboxTeam documentation repository contains Swap APY, liquidity-provider token, audit, and related protocol documentation. Confidence is medium because the public first-party documentation set is older and the current multichain deployment footprint is corroborated by the June 2026 DEX candidate source.

evidence.title: Defibox application
evidence.notes: Current first-party Defibox application endpoint is reachable and identifies the active Defibox EOS product surface.

evidence.title: Defibox documentation repository
evidence.notes: First-party DefiboxTeam repository preserves protocol documentation including Swap APY APIs, liquidity-provider token documentation, audit reports, data structures, and lending-related materials supporting the exchange and liquidity-platform identity.

evidence.title: Defibox DEX discovery entry
evidence.notes: June 2026 DEX candidate corpus source identifies Defibox in the DEX category across BNB Chain, Vaulta, and WAX, corroborating the current multichain exchange footprint.
